ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Application_Status__c, "Approved"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Application_Status__c), "Approved")), OR( ISBLANK(Total_Repayment_Amount__c), ISBLANK(Interest_Rate__c), ISBLANK(Repayment_Tenure_Months__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can approve this loan application only after Total Repayment Amount, Interest Rate, and Repayment Tenure Months are populated
